title: Add capitalize utility to src/utils/strings.ts with tests
description: Create src/utils/strings.ts with a capitalize function and co-located src/utils/strings.test.ts tests. The function should uppercase the first character of the string (sentence case) and lowercase the remainder, handling edge cases such as empty strings and already-uppercase inputs.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility files in src/utils/ with co-located .test.ts files (though src/utils/ directory does not yet exist — this will be the first utility)
